# zstack_l2vlan_network (Resource)

Manage ZStack L2 VLAN networks. L2 VLAN networks provide VLAN-based network isolation and can be attached to clusters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the L2 VLAN network.
- `vlan` (Number) The VLAN ID for this L2 network (1-4094).
- `zone_uuid` (String) The UUID of the zone where the L2 VLAN network resides.

### Optional

- `attached_cluster_uuids` (List of String) The list of cluster UUIDs to which this L2 VLAN network is attached.
- `description` (String) The description of the L2 VLAN network.
- `physical_interface` (String) The physical network interface (e.g., eth0, bond0) used by this L2 VLAN network.
- `vswitch_type` (String) The virtual switch type (e.g., LinuxBridge, OvsDpdk).

### Read-Only

- `type` (String) The type of the L2 network (e.g., L2VlanNetwork).
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the L2 VLAN network.
